Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.controller

Class GameScreenController

java.lang.Object
com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
public class GameScreenController extends Object
The controller behind main-view.fxml: the single screen the whole game runs on. Owns the persistent BattlefieldView3D (added to the scene graph in code, not in the FXML -- see initialize()) and layers the right 2D overlay on top of it for whichever GamePhase is active.

Delegates all actual game logic to MainGameController; this class's only job is translating between screen state (which pane is showing) and that controller's events (ShipPlacementListener, CombatListener).
